category_scores.honest_reason: The five-realities plus evidence loop architecture is differentiated and serious.
category_scores.what_is_real: Five realities, app-stack layout, context wiring, workflow guidance, evidence loop.
category_scores.what_is_missing: Governed multi-user operating system and mature data layer.
category_scores.next_upgrade_needed: Turn doctrine into shared reusable architecture beyond Darren.

category_scores.honest_reason: Real doctrine exists beyond a normal dashboard, but it is still qualitative.
category_scores.what_is_real: Five Futures, One Move, 9-path map, evidence and confidence context.
category_scores.what_is_scaffold: Future movement scoring and repeatable future model governance.
category_scores.next_upgrade_needed: Add governed evidence weighting and review history.

category_scores.honest_reason: One Move status, Outcome Ledger, proof targets, and summaries exist, but proof volume is thin.
category_scores.what_is_real: Status, ledger events, proof targets, evidence gaps.
category_scores.what_is_missing: Reliable real-world evidence volume and financial proof.
category_scores.next_upgrade_needed: Make evidence capture a repeatable weekly workflow.

category_scores.honest_reason: Latest strategy, snapshots, ledger, summaries, and since-last comparisons exist.
category_scores.what_is_real: Saved strategy, session summaries, latest draft, movement assessment.
category_scores.next_upgrade_needed: Add historical strategy/evidence timeline and review states.

category_scores.honest_reason: Adaptive Draft exists but remains pending-review output without adoption workflow.
category_scores.what_is_real: Draft generation from latest strategy, ledger, summaries, movement, compact context.
category_scores.what_is_missing: Human approval workflow and diff against active strategy.

category_scores.honest_reason: Evidence bands are responsible but coarse.
category_scores.next_upgrade_needed: Govern movement criteria and store movement history.

category_scores.honest_reason: The system records evidence, but it does not truly learn from outcomes yet.
category_scores.what_is_real: Evidence can be recorded and later reviewed.
category_scores.next_upgrade_needed: Connect accepted evidence to reviewed strategy updates.

category_scores.honest_reason: Mutations require confirmation and strategy replacement is not autonomous.
category_scores.what_is_real: Confirmed action boundaries and non-mutating chat.
category_scores.what_is_scaffold: Formal review permissions and audit governance.

category_scores.honest_reason: Truth boundaries are strong and consistently represented.
category_scores.what_is_real: Unavailable fields, claim boundaries, movement boundaries, people boundary.
category_scores.what_is_scaffold: Automated claim-risk review across all outputs.
category_scores.what_is_missing: Formal claim classifier and release gating.
category_scores.next_upgrade_needed: Add confidence boundary consolidation and claim checks.

category_scores.honest_reason: Financial/admin proof is mostly activity counts, not real indexed revenue or conversion proof.
category_scores.what_is_real: Profile count, assessment count, company grouping.
category_scores.what_is_scaffold: Revenue, subscription, payment, and RRG proof.
category_scores.next_upgrade_needed: Connect payment, revenue, subscription, conversion, and RRG evidence.

category_scores.honest_reason: Outside-signal doctrine exists but no governed external context runtime is live.
App-stack layout and workflow chat make it usable, though it is still dense.
category_scores.what_is_real: Chat-first top surface, current state, default-open outputs/evidence, collapsed stacks.
category_scores.what_is_missing: User-tested flow and simplification after real Darren usage.
category_scores.next_upgrade_needed: Observe Darren using it and remove friction.

category_scores.honest_reason: It is Darren-specific and not ready for enterprise/team deployment.
category_scores.what_is_missing: Permissions, tenancy, org people layer, governance, repeatable workflows.
category_scores.next_upgrade_needed: Build account/org architecture only after Darren proof.

category_scores.honest_reason: Routes and smokes pass; one transient Strategy Chat 500 was observed and not reproduced.
category_scores.what_is_real: Production route health and chat smokes.
category_scores.next_upgrade_needed: Add non-invasive monitoring and browser smoke automation.

category_scores.honest_reason: Conceptually ambitious but far from operational intelligence infrastructure.
category_scores.what_is_missing: Scale, governance, data integration, provenance, permissions, model ops.
category_scores.next_upgrade_needed: Mature data, governance, and operational workflows.

ten_point_unlocks: Create a formal review/adopt/reject flow for Adaptive Draft
Add browser smoke automation and monitoring
twenty_five_point_unlocks: Build a governed loop where accepted decisions and ledger evidence update strategy/future movement after review
Connect financial proof, external signals, and longitudinal evidence history
Move from Darren-specific proof lab to repeatable multi-account architecture
honest_palantir_comparison: Not close in execution. Conceptually it points toward operational intelligence, but current deployed state is an internal alpha proof lab, not operational infrastructure.
darren_usage_guidance: Use it as a guided strategy dashboard. Start with Current Operating State and Strategy Chat, execute One Move, record proof, and treat futures as evidence-gated.
recommended_next_step: Use with Darren, monitor friction, then prioritize financial proof indexing and governed strategy review/adoption.
